title: PMWU-DAT
description: The Damage Assessment Toolkit allows players to rate and document tornadoes that occur within their world.
body:
# Introduction
The Damage Assessment Toolkit allows players to rate and document tornadoes that occur within their world, this addon mod has compatibility for both single player worlds and multiplayer servers.

FOR SERVER ADMINISTRATORS;
Configuration options through permission nodes are available to let your players access and submit to the DAT, along with configurable options for photo submissions.

Shall you need to delete DAT submissions, they can be found here;
* Singleplayer: `/saves/<world_name>/data/pmwu_tornado_database.dat`
* Server: `/<world_name>/data/pmwu_tornado_database.dat`

# Commands
`/tordb` View the database!\
`/tordbadmin` Accept ratings, adjust ratings or delete ratings. Requires OP.

# Requirements
ProtoManly's Weather\
Exposure Mod v. 1.9.12\
LuckPerms [Optional]

# Support
Support for all PMWU mods are available within the [PMWU Support Discord](https://discord.gg/UmuhrS7vkU) server.

# Extra
This mod is apart of the PMWU modline, which was created to add multiple addon mods to [ProtoManly's Weather](https://modrinth.com/mod/protomanlys-weather). All PMWU mods are compatible with each other, but they have not been tested for compatability with other PMW sidemods.

This mod has been vigorously tested, but bugs may still appear. If you encounter a bug, please submit it to the [PMWU Support Discord](https://discord.gg/UmuhrS7vkU) server in a ticket.
